campaign: REVENUE SPRINT — Task B: Paid ASX Screener Thread
post_text:
What the screen looked for:

→ P/E ratio under 15
→ Revenue growth >10% YoY
→ Debt-to-equity below 0.5
→ Positive free cash flow
→ Return on equity >12%
→ Earnings consistency across 3 years

Most ASX small-caps fail 3 or more of these. 8 passed all 6.

#ASX #investing #smallcap #stocks
